name: Miguel O’Hara — The Phantom of the Opera
description:
AHH I WAS SO EXCITED TO WRITE THIS ONE! I love this movie and I saw this picture on Pinterest and I immediately knew I had to write it! Though my memory of the movie is not that good, I tried my best to write it accordingly to the events at the beginning of the 2004 film!

Don’t pay too much attention to the cover, btw! You can be any gender because in this AU we are going to pretend that was okay in 1800s France 😁

Also, I put a dead dove because we all know that the Phantom would stop at nothing to have the user.
creator: ssou1reader
